phases.description: Implement from Trigger.dev: Run detail page with pass/fail, steps, logs, retry — copy for Worker Hub job dashboard
Implement from Inngest: Step timeline + trace retention tiers on every factory job
Implement from Hatchet: Priority lanes + durable steps for agent orchestration
Implement from Upstash QStash: Lightweight dispatch layer for hub Actions → cloud workers
Implement from Langfuse: Hierarchical trace viewer per agent turn with cost/latency
Implement from Helicone: Per-model cost and latency dashboard on dispatch
Implement from AgentOps: Time-travel replay for worker/agent debugging
Implement from Braintrust: PASS/FAIL eval score on shipped agent runs
Implement from Promptfoo: Pre-ship eval gate on worker output
Implement from Giskard: Pre-prod agent regression test library
Implement from Mastra: Standard agent harness hooks in SourceA motor
Implement from Restate: Long-running worker without orchestrator ghost state
Implement from Windmill: Internal ops job dashboard with run history
Implement from Pipedream: Connector-based automation run log pattern
Implement from Activepieces: Self-hostable workflow runs for portfolio factories
Implement from Relay.app: Approval step before ACT/implement in worker loop
Implement from Vellum: Versioned prompt + eval on every dispatch
Implement from Portkey: Route models + log every call at dispatch
Implement from Literal AI: Conversation/run logging for agent sessions
Implement from Hamming AI: Regression scenario suite before agent release

tiers.description: Critical — smallest shippable slice with receipt
High — next sprint parity with competitor
Low — research, defer note, or compare-only
